title: untitled.log
body:
![Public beta release banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aba7c951194d4f5bfd91e7ebef82d37c8edffd63_0.webp)
**⚠️ This mod is still under development.** While I have tried my best to minimize bugs, you will still encounter them. Reporting any bugs you find is appreciated. ## join the discord server!! https://discord.gg/untitledlog sneak peeks and updates :) # VERSION 1.1.0 is in development, overhauling everything! ## THIS MOD IS FOR FABRIC!!! IT WON'T WORK ON FORGE ## untitled.log Something is wrong with your world. The mod will add various dimensions, entities, a boss, and other things. Its goal is to promote uneasiness until you are brought to one of the many dimensions, where the tortured souls remain. There are currently 14 accessible dimensions and 20 entities. ## things to keep in mind common things you should know before playing the mod, especially in its current state: - please read the dependencies list (geckolib, etc.) - while minimal, the mod does interact outside of the game. - since this mod is beta, some common bugs during your playthrough can be fixed via **/untitledlog** debug commands, such as **/untitledlog info**. - if you are seemingly not being teleported to another dimension, use **/untitledlog debugRandomTeleportPool**, if it only says "overworld" then something is broken. - any of the mod's custom events can be triggered via **/untitledlog event [event_name]** or **/untitledlog dimension [dimension_name]**


rest now
